data.title: What is ASTER and Why is it Pumping? CZ Binance Shows Massive Support
data.description:
ASTER is a cryptocurrency that has recently gained significant attention in the market, leading to a surge in its value and trading volume. But what exactly is ASTER, and why is it experiencing such a remarkable increase in interest and support? Recently, CZ Binance, the CEO of one of the largest cryptocurrency exchanges in the world, has publicly expressed his backing for ASTER, which has further fueled its popularity and prompted investors to take notice. This unusual level of endorsement from a prominent figure in the crypto industry indicates the potential growth and underlying strength of ASTER, making it a topic worth exploring for both seasoned traders and newcomers alike.
source: https://blocknews.com/what-is-aster-and-why-is-it-pumping-cz-binance-shows-massive-support/

data.title: Russia sees no reason to expand crypto mining ban
data.description:
Russia has no plans to impose further restrictions on cryptocurrency mining as it’s not currently facing power shortages, a government official announced. The vast, energy-rich country, which is a major mining destination, has limited or completely banned the minting of digital coins in a number of regions experiencing electricity deficits. Russian government halts mining ban […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-sees-no-reason-to-expand-crypto-mining-ban/
